member.name: T:LB.Utility.Attributes.EnumAliasAttribute
member.summary: Used to decorate an enumerator value with an alias that the value can be selected by

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Attributes.EnumAliasAttribute.GetEnumValue``1(System.Char)
member.summary: Will attempt to get the value of the enum by the name or alias
member.param: The character value of the enum or its alias
member.returns: The enum value if it exists, otherwise null

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Attributes.EnumAliasAttribute.GetEnumValue``1(System.String)
member.summary: Will attempt to get the value of the enum by the name or alias
member.param: The string value of the enum or its alias
member.returns: The enum value if it exists, otherwise null

member.name: P:LB.Utility.Attributes.EnumAliasAttribute.Aliases
member.summary: The list of aliases to know the enum by

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Attributes.EnumAliasAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructs the EnumAliasAttribute with the provided alias
member.param: The alias to know the enum value by

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Attributes.EnumAliasAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Constructs the EnumAliasAttribute with the provided aliases
member.param: A list of aliases to know the enum value by

member.returns: The collection with whitespace trimmed from each element

member.returns: A IEnumerable with all null values removed

member.summary: Returns true if the collection is null or has no items
member.returns: True if the list is null or has no elements

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.CollectionExtensions.GetHalves``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Divides the list into even parts
member.remarks: For odd length lists, the first half will have on more element
member.returns: Two lists created from dividing the list in half

member.summary: List of Roman Numerals for the method

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.Between(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks that the value is between the min and max inclusive. Returns the value unless it is outside the range when it will return the min or max as appropriate

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.ToFeetInches(System.Int32,System.String,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary: Returns the value in inches to a string in the format ##'##"

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.ToFeetInches(System.Double,System.String,System.IFormatProvider)
member.summary:
Returns the value in inches to a string in the format given
f = feet F = feet even if zero i = inches I = inches even if zero n = total inches

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.ToOrdinal(System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds the ordinal suffix to an
member.param: The to add the suffix to
member.returns: The orginal with it's appropriate suffix

member.summary: Adds the ordinal suffix to an
member.param: The to add the suffix to
member.returns: The orginal with it's appropriate suffix

member.summary: Converts an to its numeric word
member.returns: The numeric word for the

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.ToText(System.Int64)
member.summary: Converts an to its numeric word
member.returns: The numeric word for the

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.ToRomanNumerals(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the Roman Numeral equivalent of the provided integer
member.remarks: Roman numerals only support numbers between 1 and 4000. Numbers outside of this range are returned as Arabic numbers.

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.ToDataSize(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the integer as a data size String
member.returns: The integer as a data size String
member.exception: Thrown if the value is a negative number

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.NumericExtensions.ToDataSize(System.UInt64,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the integer as a data size String
member.returns: The integer as a data size String

member.name: T:LB.Utility.Extensions.StringBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extenions methods for the StringBuilder type

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.StringBuilderExtensions.IsNullOrEmpty(System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Returns true if the string builder is empty
member.returns: true if the value parameter is null or an empty string (""); otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.StringBuilderExtensions.IsNullOrWhitespace(System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Returns true if the string builder is empty
member.returns: true if the value parameter is null or System.String.Empty, or if value consists exclusively of white-space characters; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:LB.Utility.Extensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for the String data type

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.StringExtensions.AOrAn(System.String)
member.summary: Determines if the indeterminite article before the string should be A or An
member.returns: The prefixed with an "a" or "an".

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Extensions.StringExtensions.GetValueOrDefault(System.String)
member.summary: Returns an empty string if extended is null
member.returns: If the string is null, an ; otherwise,

member.summary: Returns the defaultValue if extended is null

member.returns: If the string is null, an ; otherwise,

member.summary: Returns true if has a value

member.summary: Indicates whether a specified string is null or empty.

member.summary: Indicates whether a specified string is null, empty, or consists only of white-space characters.
member.returns: true if the value parameter is null or , or if value consists exclusively of white-space characters.

member.returns: A substring of

member.summary: The minimum index displayed on the current page

member.name: T:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG
member.summary: A crossplatform pseudo random number generator

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.CreateRandomSeed
member.summary: Generates a random seed used when no seed is provided in the constructor

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.SeedFromString(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the to a UInt64 for use as a seed
member.exception: Thrown if the seed is an

member.name: P:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.Seed
member.summary: The seed used to prime the generator

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a PCG32 RNG

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.#ctor(System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Creates a PCG32 RNG

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextInt32
member.summary: Returns a uniformly distributed Int32 (full range).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextInt32(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns an Int32 in [0, maxExclusive).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextInt32(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns an Int32 in [minInclusive, maxExclusive).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextInt64
member.summary: Returns a uniformly distributed Int64 (full range).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextInt64(System.Int64)
member.summary: Returns an Int64 in [0, maxExclusive).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextInt64(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Returns an Int64 in [minInclusive, maxExclusive).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextUInt32
member.summary: Returns a uniformly distributed 32-bit unsigned integer.

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextUInt32(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns an Int32 in [0, maxExclusive).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextUInt64
member.summary: Returns a uniformly distributed 32-bit unsigned integer.

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextUInt64(System.UInt64,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Returns an Int32 in [0, maxExclusive).

member.name: M:LB.Utility.Random.PseudoRNG.NextDouble
member.summary: Returns a double in [0, 1).
